references.text: Geesink, R. 1971. Portulacaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 7: 121-133
Nyffeler, R, & U Eggli. 2010. An up-to-date familial and suprafamilial classification of succulent plants. Bradleya 28: 125-144

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 23 October 2024

species.citation: (L.) Juss. , Gen. Pl. (Jussieu) (1789) 312; ≡ Portulaca fruticosa L. , Syst. Nat., 10th Ed. 2 (1759) 1045. = Talinum triangulare (Jacq.) Willd. , Sp. Pl., 4th Ed. 2 (1799) 862 ; Moody, Weeds reported in rice in South and Southeast Asia (1989) 296; ≡ Portulaca triangularis Jacq. , Enum. Syst. Pl. (1760) 22.
species.notes: Introduced to the Philippines, used as an ornamental in succulent collections. Naturalized in rice fields and riparian zones.
